LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROGER CARDENAS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT AND LEAVE TO AMEND ANSWER IS PROCEDURALLY DEFICIENT. AS TO THE LEAVE SOUGHT TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY DECLARATION TO SHOW THAT IT WOULD BE IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE TO GRANT LEAVE TO FILE; AND SOME REASONABLE EXCUSE WHY THE CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS NOT FILED EARLIER. (CCP 426.50.) AS TO THE LEAVE SOUGHT TO AMEND AN ANSWER, DEFENDANT HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH CRC 3.1324(A) AND (B). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File X-Complt
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROGER CARDENAS' MOTION FOR LEAVE To File Cross-Complaint is Denied, without prejudice. Defendant's motion for leave to file a cross-complaint and leave to amend answer is procedurally deficient. As to the leave sought to file a cross-complaint, Defendant has not provided any declaration to show that it would be in the interest of justice to grant leave to file; and some reasonable excuse why the cross-complaint was not filed earlier. (CCP 426.50.) As to the leave sought to amend an answer, Defendant has not complied with CRC 3.1324(a) and (b). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
